testcase.name: testAddUserWithInvalidData

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <400> but was <200>.

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: testViewUserWithInvalidData

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <404> but was <204>.

testcase.name: testUpdateUserWithInvalidData

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html;charset=utf-8".

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected content-type "JSON" doesn't match actual content-type "text/html;charset=utf-8".
